message:
Add GitHub Actions CI/CD and upgrade self-update with checksum verification

- CI workflow: ShellCheck, bash syntax validation, installation tests
  (ubuntu + macOS), and VERSION file consistency checks
- Release workflow: tag-triggered releases with SHA256 checksums,
  version validation (tag vs script vs VERSION file), and ACFS notification
- Notify-ACFS workflow: triggers downstream checksum updates when
  installer changes on main
- Self-update (do_update) now downloads from GitHub Releases with
  SHA256 checksum verification, cache busting, bash syntax validation
  before replacement, and atomic file swap
- Add VERSION file for version tracking
- Update README with new --message, --message-file, --skip-deps flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+# CI Workflow for post_compact_reminder
+# Runs on every push and PR to main
+#
+# Validates shell scripts with ShellCheck, syntax checks, installation testing,
+# and version consistency between VERSION file and installer script.
+
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# Cancel in-progress runs for the same branch/PR
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+# Minimal permissions - read-only access to repository contents
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  shellcheck:
+    name: ShellCheck
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Run ShellCheck
+        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@2.0.0
+        with:
+          scandir: '.'
+          severity: warning
+          additional_files: 'install-post-compact-reminder.sh'
+
+  syntax:
+    name: Bash Syntax
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Check installer syntax
+        run: bash -n install-post-compact-reminder.sh
+
+  install-test:
+    name: Installation Test (${{ matrix.os }})
+    needs: [shellcheck, syntax]
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          if [[ "$(uname)" == "Darwin" ]]; then
+            brew install jq 2>/dev/null || true
+          else
+            sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+          fi
+
+      - name: Run installer (dry-run)
+        run: |
+          chmod +x install-post-compact-reminder.sh
+          ./install-post-compact-reminder.sh --dry-run
+
+      - name: Run installer
+        run: |
+          ./install-post-compact-reminder.sh --yes
+
+      - name: Verify hook script exists
+        run: |
+          test -x "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-post-compact-reminder"
+          echo "Hook script is installed and executable"
+
+      - name: Test hook with compact source
+        run: |
+          output=$(echo '{"session_id": "test-ci", "source": "compact"}' | "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-post-compact-reminder")
+          if echo "$output" | grep -q "post-compact-reminder"; then
+            echo "Hook correctly outputs reminder for compact source"
+          else
+            echo "::error::Hook did not output expected reminder"
+            echo "Output was: $output"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      - name: Test hook with startup source (should be silent)
+        run: |
+          output=$(echo '{"session_id": "test-ci", "source": "startup"}' | "$HOME/.local/bin/claude-post-compact-reminder")
+          if [[ -z "$output" ]]; then
+            echo "Hook correctly silent for startup source"
+          else
+            echo "::error::Hook should not output anything for startup source"
+            echo "Output was: $output"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      - name: Check status
+        run: ./install-post-compact-reminder.sh --status
+
+      - name: Test uninstall (dry-run)
+        run: ./install-post-compact-reminder.sh --uninstall --dry-run
+
+  version-check:
+    name: Version Consistency
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Check VERSION file exists
+        run: |
+          if [[ ! -f VERSION ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::VERSION file not found"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+      - name: Verify version matches
+        run: |
+          if [[ ! -f VERSION ]]; then
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          file_version=$(cat VERSION | tr -d '\r\n')
+          script_version=$(grep -m1 'VERSION=' install-post-compact-reminder.sh | cut -d'"' -f2)
+
+          if [[ "$file_version" != "$script_version" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::VERSION file ($file_version) does not match installer script ($script_version)"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          echo "Versions are consistent: $file_version"

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+# .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
+#
+# Notifies ACFS (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup) when the installer script changes
+# on the main branch, triggering checksum updates in the downstream repository.
+#
+# Setup:
+#   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
+#   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
+#   3. Optionally set ACFS_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=true in repository variables
+
+name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'install-post-compact-reminder.sh'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      reason:
+        description: 'Reason for manual trigger'
+        required: false
+        default: 'Manual checksum update'
+
+# Minimal permissions - no repository access needed
+permissions: {}
+
+# Prevent duplicate notifications for the same commit
+concurrency:
+  group: acfs-notify-${{ github.sha }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+jobs:
+  notify-acfs:
+    name: Trigger ACFS Checksum Update
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+    if: ${{ vars.ACFS_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED == 'true' || github.repository == 'Dicklesworthstone/post_compact_reminder' }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Validate dispatch token exists
+        id: validate
+        run: |
+          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN"
+            echo "::error::Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
+          event-type: upstream-changed
+          client-payload: |
+            {
+              "tool": "post_compact_reminder",
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
+              "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
+              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
+              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || '' }}",
+              "reason": "${{ github.event.inputs.reason || '' }}"
+            }
+
+      - name: Log dispatch result
+        run: |
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Tool: post_compact_reminder"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "  Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+          echo "  Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"

@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Release Workflow for post_compact_reminder
+# Triggered by version tags (v*)
+#
+# Creates GitHub releases with checksums for self-update verification
+
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+# Only write permission needed for creating releases
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+# Prevent concurrent releases
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+jobs:
+  release:
+    name: Create Release with Checksums
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Extract version from tag
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "Releasing version: $VERSION"
+
+      - name: Verify script version matches tag
+        run: |
+          script_version=$(grep -m1 'VERSION=' install-post-compact-reminder.sh | cut -d'"' -f2)
+          tag_version="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+
+          if [[ "$script_version" != "$tag_version" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Script VERSION ($script_version) does not match tag ($tag_version)"
+            echo "Please update VERSION in install-post-compact-reminder.sh before tagging"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          echo "Version check passed: $tag_version"
+
+      - name: Verify VERSION file matches tag
+        run: |
+          if [[ -f VERSION ]]; then
+            file_version=$(cat VERSION | tr -d '\r\n')
+            tag_version="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+
+            if [[ "$file_version" != "$tag_version" ]]; then
+              echo "::error::VERSION file ($file_version) does not match tag ($tag_version)"
+              exit 1
+            fi
+          fi
+
+      - name: Compute SHA256 checksums
+        run: |
+          echo "Computing checksums..."
+          sha256sum install-post-compact-reminder.sh > checksums.txt
+          cat checksums.txt
+
+      - name: Create individual checksum files
+        run: |
+          sha256sum install-post-compact-reminder.sh | awk '{print $1}' > install-post-compact-reminder.sh.sha256
+
+      - name: Generate release notes
+        run: |
+          cat > release_notes.md << 'RELEASE_EOF'
+          ## Installation
+
+          ```bash
+          curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/post_compact_reminder/main/install-post-compact-reminder.sh | bash
+          ```
+
+          ## Verify Installation (Optional)
+
+          After downloading, verify the checksum:
+
+          ```bash
+          # Download the installer
+          curl -fsSL -o install-post-compact-reminder.sh \
+            https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/post_compact_reminder/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/install-post-compact-reminder.sh
+
+          # Verify checksum
+          expected=$(curl -fsSL https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/post_compact_reminder/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/install-post-compact-reminder.sh.sha256)
+          actual=$(sha256sum install-post-compact-reminder.sh | awk '{print $1}')
+          if [[ "$expected" == "$actual" ]]; then
+            echo "Checksum verified!"
+            bash install-post-compact-reminder.sh
+          else
+            echo "CHECKSUM MISMATCH - do not run!"
+          fi
+          ```
+
+          ## Checksums
+
+          SHA256 checksums for this release are attached as `checksums.txt`.
+          RELEASE_EOF
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          name: Post-Compact Reminder v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          body_path: release_notes.md
+          files: |
+            install-post-compact-reminder.sh
+            checksums.txt
+            install-post-compact-reminder.sh.sha256
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          append_body: true
+          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
+
+    outputs:
+      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+
+  notify-acfs:
+    name: Notify ACFS
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: release
+    if: ${{ vars.ACFS_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED == 'true' || github.repository == 'Dicklesworthstone/post_compact_reminder' }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Check for dispatch token
+        id: check_token
+        run: |
+          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN not configured - skipping ACFS notification"
+            echo "skip=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "skip=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
+        if: steps.check_token.outputs.skip != 'true'
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
+          event-type: upstream-changed
+          client-payload: |
+            {
+              "tool": "post_compact_reminder",
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
+              "version": "${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}",
+              "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
+              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
+              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
+            }
+
+      - name: Log dispatch
+        if: steps.check_token.outputs.skip != 'true'
+        run: |
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Tool: post_compact_reminder"
+          echo "  Version: ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
